otherAspects.safety: Handling of diethylzinc (DEZ) and concentrated H₂O₂ requires careful ventilation and protective equipment.
Handling of diethylzinc (DEZ) and H₂O₂ requires careful ventilation and protective equipment.
Handling of diethylzinc (DEZ) and plasma oxygen requires careful ventilation and protective equipment.
Handling of diethylzinc (DEZ) and H₂O requires careful ventilation and protective equipment.
Handling of diethylzinc (DEZ) and H₂O₂/annealing requires careful ventilation and protective equipment.
Handling of diethylzinc (DEZ) and O₂ plasma requires careful ventilation and protective equipment.
Handling of diethylzinc (DEZ) and H₂O₂ at 325 °C requires careful ventilation and protective equipment.
Handling of diethylzinc (DEZ) and O₂ plasma at 550 °C requires careful ventilation and protective equipment.
